top_signals.title: OT GROUP CEO on Onitsuka Tiger Spinning off from Asics
top_signals.summary: Onitsuka Tiger is looking to bring its mark as an independent brand, separate from Asics. OT GROUP President and CEO Ryoji Shoda sat down for an interview with Bloomberg News' Shery Ahn in Tokyo to explain his vision for the brand going forward. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Trump signs memo aimed at ending Iran war, White House official says - Reuters
top_signals.summary: Trump signs memo aimed at ending Iran war, White House official says  Reuters
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Patch Tuesday, May 2026 Edition
top_signals.summary: Artificial intelligence platforms may be just as susceptible to social engineering as human beings, but they are proving remarkably good at finding security vulnerabilities in human-made computer code. That reality is on full display this month with some of the more widely-used software makers -- including Apple, Google, Microsoft, Mozilla and Oracle -- fixing near record volumes of security bugs, and/or quickening the tempo of their patch releases.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Kristi Noem joins British Columbia copper junior in advisory role
top_signals.summary: NovaRed Mining holds two early-stage copper exploration assets in the Canadian province.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: China could retaliate against threats to critical metal security: analysts
top_signals.summary: China’s new Mineral Resources Law, which took effect this week, could give the Asian giant a formal legal basis to fight against foreign restrictions.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Traders now see Fed raising rates by September - Reuters
top_signals.summary: Traders now see Fed raising rates by September  Reuters
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: BWX Agrees to License Nuclear Reactor Design After Activist Push
top_signals.summary: BWX Technologies Inc. has struck a deal to license its design for a small modular reactor, after activist investor Ananym Capital Management pushed the nuclear technology company to consider commercializing it.

top_signals.title: Allseas deep-sea mining contract violates UN law, says Greenpeace-backed analysis
top_signals.summary: The legal opinion also states that the Dutch government "is legally bound to intervene."
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Lawmakers Demand Answers as CISA Tries to Contain Data Leak
top_signals.summary: Lawmakers in both houses of Congress are demanding answers from the U.S. Cybersecurity & Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) after KrebsOnSecurity reported this week that a CISA contractor intentionally published AWS GovCloud keys and a vast trove of other agency secrets on a public GitHub account. The inquiry comes as CISA is still struggling to contain the breach and invalidate the leaked credentials.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
